pr.title: Add vehicle service landing pages
pr.body: ## Summary - Adds service marketplace landing pages for `/service`, `/mechanics`, `/detailers`, `/tyres`, and `/roadworthy`. - Adds a shared `ServiceLandingPage` component for consistent styling and copy. - Adds the service pages to the sitemap and footer navigation. - Updates the listing buyer protection card to show a Vehicle History Report section with checks for no finance owing, no stolen record, and no write-off record. - Adds vehicle history report tiers at `$9.95`, `$14.95`, and `$19.95`. - Allows buyers to open Stripe checkout for a selected vehicle history report tier. - Redirects successful report purchases back to the vehicle listing with report success parameters. - Adds a Value My Car trade-offer flow: Value My Car -> Request Trade Offers -> Dealers Bid -> Seller Chooses Offer. - Updates the valuation result CTA from `Get Dealer Offers` to `Request Trade Offers`. - Adds Isuzu D-Max to homepage popular searches alongside Toyota Hilux and Ford Ranger. - Adds an Isuzu D-Max sample ute listing using Drivaroo stock imagery. - Adds comparison pages for `/compare/hilux-vs-ranger` and `/compare/cx-5-vs-rav4`. - Adds `Hilux vs Ranger` and `CX-5 vs RAV4` to homepage popular searches. - Includes comparison pages in the sitemap. - Includes clear copy that buyers should complete their own PPSR/history checks and Drivaroo does not guarantee report results unless a completed report is expressly supplied. ## Testing - `npx eslint src/components/ServiceLandingPage.tsx src/app/service/page.tsx src/app/mechanics/page.tsx src/app/detailers/page.tsx src/app/tyres/page.tsx src/app/roadworthy/page.tsx src/app/sitemap.ts src/components/SiteFooter.tsx` - `npx eslint src/app/cars/[id]/page.tsx` (passes with existing vehicle detail setState-in-effect warning) - `npx eslint src/lib/featured-listing.ts src/app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts src/app/api/stripe/success/route.ts src/app/cars/[id]/page.tsx` (passes with existing vehicle detail setState-in-effect warning) - `npx eslint src/app/value-my-car/page.tsx` (passes with existing value page setState-in-effect warning) - `npx eslint src/components/HomeSearch.tsx src/lib/sample-vehicles.ts` (passes with existing HomeSearch setState-in-effect warnings) - `npx eslint 'src/app/compare/[slug]/page.tsx' src/components/HomeSearch.tsx src/app/sitemap.ts` (passes with existing HomeSearch setState-in-effect warnings) - `npm run build`
pr.author: shaunsjjones1977-create
